metadata.title: Smart Sourcing USA - Connection-Based Remote Teams
metadata.description: Connection-Based Remote Teams, Not Transactional Outsourcing. Build long-term, transcontinental connections with teams in the Philippines and Mexico.

footer.tagline: Connection-based talent partner for U.S. companies. Offices in Philippines and Mexico.
footer.motto: Powered by people, defined by connection.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Smart Sourcing USA. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Build Remote Teams That Feel Like
hero.subtitle: Connection-based staffing solutions for construction, architecture, and professional services. Access top talent in the Philippines and Mexico without the overhead of traditional outsourcing.

connectionBanner.title: Connection Over Transaction
connectionBanner.description: We don't just outsource—we build integrated teams that become extensions of your company, not vendors on the side.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Smart Sourcing USA?
whyChoose.subtitle: We've redefined remote staffing for construction and professional services by putting relationships first.

benefits.title: Connection-Based Approach
benefits.description: Traditional outsourcing is transactional. We build long-term partnerships where your remote team integrates seamlessly into your culture, workflows, and goals. They feel like your people because we invest in making that connection real.

benefits.title: On-the-Ground Presence
benefits.description: With offices in the Philippines and Mexico, we provide hands-on support, cultural alignment, and local expertise. You get the benefits of global talent with the reliability of boots-on-the-ground management.

benefits.title: Construction Industry Expertise
benefits.description: We specialize in construction staffing—from estimators and project coordinators to architects and administrative support. We understand asphalt contractors, general contractors, cladding specialists, and the unique demands of your industry.

benefits.title: Cost Efficiency Without Compromise
benefits.description: Reduce operational costs by 40-60% compared to U.S. hiring while maintaining quality. No overhead for office space, equipment, or benefits—we handle all infrastructure so you can focus on growth.

benefits.title: Scalability & Flexibility
benefits.description: Scale your workforce up or down based on project demands without long-term commitments. Whether you need one estimator or an entire project team, we adapt to your cycles and workload fluctuations.

benefits.title: Pre-Vetted, Educated Workforce
benefits.description: Access a diverse pool of highly educated professionals. The Philippines and Mexico offer strong technical education systems, producing talent in engineering, architecture, project management, and business operations at competitive rates.

benefits.title: Cultural Fit & Retention
benefits.description: We don't just match skills—we match values. Our upfront investment in understanding your culture leads to better team integration, higher retention rates, and fewer headaches from vendor churn.

benefits.title: Faster Onboarding & Training
benefits.description: We handle recruitment, training, and integration. Your new team members arrive ready to contribute, embedded in your tools, processes, and communication rhythms from day one.

benefits.title: Risk Mitigation & Compliance
benefits.description: We manage all employment compliance, HR administration, and regulatory requirements in-country. You avoid the complexity of international employment law while maintaining full operational control.

comparison.title: Head-to-Head Process Comparison
comparison.subtitle: See exactly where traditional outsourcing fails and Smart Sourcing USA delivers

testimonial.quote: "We tried traditional outsourcing and kept churning through vendors. Smart Sourcing USA built us a connected team in the Philippines that feels like our own people—and performance shows it."

steps.title: Discovery & Mapping
steps.description: We map your workflows, culture, and goals to identify where remote teams create the most leverage for your business.

steps.title: Design & Build
steps.description: We design roles, hiring profiles, and work cadences—then recruit and build your team in the Philippines or Mexico.

steps.title: Integration & Optimization
steps.description: We embed your team into your tools and rhythms, then provide ongoing support and optimization to ensure sustained performance.

services.label: OUR PRODUCTS
services.title: Specialized Services for Construction
services.subtitle: Remote teams designed for the unique demands of your industry

items.title: Construction Estimating
items.description: Takeoff support, bid preparation, cost analysis, and vendor coordination for asphalt, masonry, cladding, and general contracting.

items.title: Project Coordination
items.description: Documentation management, scheduling support, submittal tracking, and RFI coordination to keep projects on track.

items.title: Architecture & Drafting
items.description: CAD drafting, design support, plan review, and technical documentation for architectural and engineering firms.

items.title: Administrative Support
items.description: Executive assistants, coordinators, schedulers, and documentation teams that keep operations running smoothly.

items.title: Customer Service
items.description: Phone, chat, and email support teams trained to mirror your brand voice and deliver exceptional service.

items.title: Back Office Operations
items.description: Billing, accounts payable, reporting, and financial workflow management for construction firms.

software.title: Software We Work With
software.subtitle: Our teams are trained on the industry-leading tools you already use.

stats.title: The Smart Sourcing USA Advantage
stats.subtitle: Real results for construction businesses like yours

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Connected Team?
cta.description: Let's design a connection-based remote team that feels like an extension of your core staff—not a vendor on the side.

hero.title: More Than Outsourcing.
hero.subtitle: Smart Sourcing USA was founded on a simple belief: The best teams aren't defined by geography, but by connection.

mission.label: OUR MISSION
mission.title: Redefining How The World Works Together
mission.p1: For too long, "outsourcing" has meant transactional relationships, hidden fees, and disposable teams. We knew there had to be a better way.
mission.p2: We built Smart Sourcing USA to bridge the gap between U.S. companies and world-class talent in the Philippines and Mexico. We don't just fill seats; we build integrated, high-performing teams that share your culture, your goals, and your vision.
mission.p3: Our mission is to help businesses scale sustainably by providing the one thing traditional BPOs miss:

presence.title: A Transcontinental Network
presence.subtitle: With offices and talent hubs across three key regions, we offer the flexibility, time-zone alignment, and diverse skill sets your business needs.

usa.title: United States
usa.description: Headquarters & Client Strategy. We are your local partners, understanding the nuance of U.S. business culture.

mexico.title: Mexico
mexico.description: Nearshore Talent Hub. Real-time collaboration, bilingual professionals, and cultural proximity.

philippines.title: Philippines
philippines.description: Global Operations Center. Highly skilled, English-proficient professionals dedicated to service excellence.

values.title: Built on Values
values.subtitle: These core principles guide every partnership we build and every team member we hire.

items.title: Connection First
items.description: People perform better when they feel part of a team, not just a vendor list.

items.title: Radical Transparency
items.description: No hidden fees, no black boxes. You know exactly who is working for you and how.

items.title: Long-Term Growth
items.description: We don't look for quick fixes. We build foundations for years of scalable success.

items.title: Excellence Always
items.description: We hire the top 1% of talent and invest in their continuous development.

cta.title: Ready to Meet Your New Team?
cta.subtitle: Stop outsourcing. Start connecting.

hero.title: Let's Build Your Connection-Based Team
hero.subtitle: Ready to move beyond transactional outsourcing?
hero.description: Tell us about your project or pick a time to talk. We'll help you build a long-term, transcontinental connection that scales your business with teams that feel like your own.

getInTouch.title: Get in Touch
getInTouch.description: We're here to help you build connection-based remote teams that transform how you scale.

whyCall.title: Why Schedule a Call?
items: Discover how connection-based teams differ from traditional outsourcing

Get a customized strategy for your business needs
